library_preparation_preflight.summary: No concrete extra setup is required: ssl-config-core_2.13:0.6.1 is a local Scala/Typesafe Config SSL/TLS configuration library, and its resolved runtime dependencies include scala-library 2.13.8 and com.typesafe:config 1.4.2. Meaningful coverage can be reached with local ConfigFactory parsing and classpath/file keystore resources, without Docker, extra runtime Maven dependencies, or environment/system properties.
risks: If generated tests intentionally exercise HTTPS revocation-list URL handling in a native image, the native test binary may need https URL protocol support; this is avoidable by keeping revocation-list coverage local or parse-only.
The library is Scala-first, so Scala test sources are the most natural way to cover APIs, but this is part of the normal Scala test scaffold rather than an extra library-specific dependency.
